meta.title: Bioghaia Environmental Engineering | Licensing, Surveying & Geoprocessing in RS
meta.description: Avoid delays, fines and uncertainty in your project. Bioghaia provides environmental licensing, surveying, geoprocessing and technical support for coastal areas with clear guidance and fast response.

company.serviceArea: Serving projects across Rio Grande do Sul, including urban, rural, coastal and expansion areas.

hero.headline: Move your project forward with clarity and confidence
hero.subheadline: Bioghaia helps you understand what your project needs in surveying, geoprocessing, environmental licensing, and technical diagnosis for coastal areas, so you avoid delays, rework and unnecessary risks.
hero.trustLine: Direct contact with a specialist. Fast replies. Clear communication.
hero.whatsappPrefill: Hello! I have a project and would like to understand what environmental or technical support is needed. Can you guide me?

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Technical solutions to reduce uncertainty, avoid problems and help your project move forward with confidence.
services.note: If you're not sure what you need yet, we can review your case and guide you in the right direction.

items.title: Surveying
items.description: Accurate land surveys for construction, land division, regularization and rural properties. Start your project with reliable data and fewer risks.

items.title: Geoprocessing
items.description: Mapping and spatial analysis to better understand your land and environmental context. Make decisions based on clear and structured data.

items.title: Environmental Licensing
items.description: Technical support to obtain permits and meet environmental requirements. Avoid delays, fines and unexpected issues during your project.

items.title: Coastal Sanitation & Environmental Diagnosis
items.description: Technical support for coastal areas involving sewage, drainage, environmental diagnosis, georeferenced mapping, territorial analysis, and guidance for safer, more organized, and better-structured interventions.

natureBand.eyebrow: Better decisions start with clear technical insight
natureBand.title: Less uncertainty. Less risk. More control.
natureBand.body: Bioghaia combines environmental analysis, territorial data, and practical expertise to help projects, properties, developments, and coastal areas move forward with compliance, clarity and confidence.

whyChoose.title: Why choose Bioghaia
whyChoose.subtitle: You don’t just need reports. You need clarity to make the right decisions.

reasons.title: Direct technical support
reasons.description: You speak directly with a specialist. This reduces miscommunication and speeds up the entire process.

reasons.title: Clear guidance
reasons.description: We translate technical requirements into simple, actionable steps so you know exactly how to move forward.

reasons.title: Focused on results
reasons.description: Every step is designed to reduce risk, ensure compliance and keep your project progressing.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions before starting a project.

items.q: What kind of clients do you work with?
items.a: We support builders, developers, engineers, architects, rural property owners, businesses, projects in coastal areas, and clients who need environmental guidance, surveying, technical studies, or licensing support.

items.q: Do you work in coastal and expansion areas?
items.a: Yes. We work across different regions, including urban, rural, coastal and developing areas.

items.q: Can Bioghaia help with sanitation, drainage, or environmental diagnosis in coastal areas?
items.a: Yes. Depending on the case, Bioghaia can support technical diagnosis, territorial analysis, georeferenced mapping, and environmental guidance for demands related to sanitation, drainage, regularization, and intervention planning.

items.q: I’m not sure what service I need. Can I still contact you?
items.a: Yes. Many clients start without knowing exactly what they need. We can review your situation and guide you.

items.q: How can I request a quote?
items.a: Send us a message on WhatsApp with your project type, location and timeline. We’ll guide you from there.

whatsAppCta.title: Tell us about your project
whatsAppCta.subtitle: A quick conversation can help you understand the next steps and avoid costly mistakes.
whatsAppCta.ariaLabel: Open WhatsApp and chat with Bioghaia
whatsAppCta.prefillMessage: Hello! I have a project in {CITY}. The estimated timeline is {TIMELINE}. I would like to understand what steps or technical requirements are needed.
whatsAppCta.prefillFallback: Hello! I have a project and would like initial guidance on surveying, geoprocessing, environmental licensing, or technical diagnosis.

qr.title: Quick access
qr.subtitle: Scan to start a conversation on WhatsApp.
qr.scanHint: On mobile, tapping the button is usually faster.
qr.imageAlt: QR code to open WhatsApp chat with Bioghaia
qr.prefillMessage: Hello! I’d like guidance on a project and understand what technical support is needed.

assistant.name: Bioghaia Assistant
assistant.intro: Hi. I’ll help you organize your project details so we can guide you more efficiently.

questions.projectType: What type of project is it? Example: construction, land, regularization, rural property, business, sanitation, or licensing.
questions.serviceNeed: Do you already know whether you need surveying, geoprocessing, licensing, environmental diagnosis, or would you like help identifying the right path?
questions.name: What is your name?
questions.contact: What is the best contact for follow-up?

footer.note: Bioghaia Environmental Engineering. Clear technical support for better decisions.
